title: Expected Floor Plan Model — Ground Truth v1
description: Manual golden-truth model used by the fidelity engine to grade an observed pipeline output. Distinct from `<plant>_micro.json` (per-room subset) and from `tests/baselines/<plant>.json` (deterministic count baseline). v1 is intentionally minimal: rooms + openings + adjacency + global_bbox. Polygon-perfect IoU, materials, mobiliario, exact wall geometry are out of scope for v1 — they belong to v2.

schema_version.description: Bumped on breaking schema changes only. v1 = this file.

source_pdf.description: Path to the original PDF that this expected model describes.

unit.description: All length / area units. v1 expects 'm' (meters) and area in m^2; 'mm' reserved for future.

scale_source.description: How the unit anchor was established. Free text. E.g. 'wall_thickness_pts=5.4 mapped to 0.19 m via PT_TO_M=0.0352'.

global_bbox.description: Outer bounding box of the apartment footprint, in `unit`. Used by the fidelity engine to detect global-scale drift.

tolerance_pct.description: % drift allowed before bbox is flagged. Default 10.

expected_counts.description: Top-level counts the observed model must roughly match.

adjacency.description: List of expected room-to-room edges. Used by adjacency_f1.

notes.description: Free-text notes for human reviewers. Not consumed by fidelity scoring.

label.description: Human-readable label as it appears (or should appear) in the consensus.rooms[].name.

expected_area_m2_range.description: [lo, hi] inclusive. Hard-fails the room when the observed area falls outside.

expected_bbox_m.description: Approximate room bbox in meters. Optional; used for visual overlays only in v1.

polygon_m.description: Optional manual polygon in meters. Reserved for v2 IoU.

must_be_closed.description: Hard-fail if observed polygon is not a closed loop with >= 3 distinct vertices.

manual_confidence.description: Annotator's confidence in this entry. Affects the fidelity engine's `weight` only; never silently drops the room.

source.description: How this row was authored. E.g. 'manual review of planta_74.pdf 2026-05-07' or 'derived from observed + manual area correction'.

expected_width_m.description: Optional. Reserved for v2 width-error metric.

connects.description: Room ids this opening connects. Length 2 for interior, length 1 for exterior.

via.description: Opening id (from `openings`) that materializes this adjacency. Optional in v1.

kind.description: How rooms touch. v1 uses this only as informational; adjacency_f1 only checks (a, b) presence.
